g.text: PTRACE_EVENT_FORK Sequence: Parent Stop → Child Birth → Dual Resume
② PTRACE_SYSCALL → resume parent for kernel to execute fork()
③ PTRACE_EVENT_FORK STOP — parent stops BEFORE syscall-exit
⑦ PTRACE_SYSCALL → resume child (consume its initial SIGSTOP)
⑧ PTRACE_SYSCALL → resume parent past PTRACE_EVENT_FORK
⑨ SYSCALL-EXIT STOP — fork() returns child_pid in parent
⑩ Child runs to first syscall — both processes now fully traced

text.tspan: copy page tables (COW) · allocate task_struct for PID 1235
deliver SIGSTOP to child BEFORE any instruction runs
[signal arg = 0: PTRACE_EVENT has no signal to deliver]
